title: strombosia ceylanica var. macrophylla
intro: Strombosia ceylanica var. macrophylla, also known as the large-leaved strombosia, is a plant species belonging to the family Meliaceae, native to Sri Lanka. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, Strombosia ceylanica var. macrophylla can be used to make decoctions, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various ailments.
